pi_items.source: setup_task.sh confirms OUTPUT_DIR=/home/ga/Documents/cancellous_study; export_result.sh references same path
PubMed study on cortical bone geometry confirms 662 ±29 HU as standard threshold for cortical bone segmentation in femoral shaft analysis. Referenced in multiple orthopedic biomechanics studies.
Cortical bone typically ranges from ~600-2100 HU in medical literature. Value of 1988 falls within standard cortical bone range documented in CT imaging research. Verifier accepts up to 2100.
Web search confirmed 'HU value of mineralized tissue is usually in the range of 226-3071'. This matches metadata exactly and is documented in medical imaging standards.
Web search confirmed 'HU value of mineralized tissue is usually in the range of 226-3071'. This is an authoritative range for all mineralized bone tissue including dense cortical bone.
Verifier.py line 30 reads required_mask_count from metadata; README.md specifies 3 masks as success criterion (compact bone + full bone + boolean result)
Verifier.py line 31 confirms min_triangles=500; export_result.sh and verifier.py both enforce this minimum for valid STL format

setup_invesalius.sh line 73 downloads v3.0 release file 0051.zip from GitHub. File is extracted to /opt/invesalius/sample_data/ct_cranium and symlinked to /home/ga/DICOM/ct_cranium. Identifier '0051' comes from official release asset name.
setup_invesalius.sh line 73 contains exact URL for CT Cranium DICOM dataset download from official InVesalius v3.0 release

privileged_info_summary: This task uses real medical imaging data from the official InVesalius 3.0 CT Cranium sample dataset (file 0051.zip) downloaded from GitHub releases. The data is not synthetic. The Hounsfield unit thresholds are medically validated: compact bone at 662-1988 HU matches published research standards for cortical bone segmentation, and the full bone range of 226-3071 HU corresponds to the established medical imaging standard for all mineralized bone tissue. The task requires creating 3 masks through boolean operations (compact bone mask + full bone mask + their subtraction result) and exporting a valid STL mesh with minimum 500 triangles.
